title: Test proposal: create second blank file in src/
summary: Creates another blank test file in src/ to validate proposal approval flow.
details: This is a second test proposal requested by the user to validate the proposal workflow. If approved, it will create an empty file at `src/test-proposal-blank-file-2.txt`.

affectedFiles.description: Blank test file for proposal flow validation

estimatedImpact: No runtime impact; adds one empty test file only after approval.
executorPrompt: Create a new empty file at src/test-proposal-blank-file-2.txt and do not modify any other files.
